document_metadata.zone_name: Seton Ridge Comprehensive Development District Zone

zone_section_start.title_label_raw: SRCDD ZONE: SETON RIDGE COMPRENSIVE DEVELOPMENT DISTRICT ZONE

zone_section_end_before.title_label_raw: WCCDD ZONE: WESTERN COMMON COMPREHENSIVE DEVELOPMENT DISTRICT

zone_class_reference.summary: SRCDD is an established class of use zone.

prohibitions.summary: With the exception of permitted uses, no development permit shall be issued for a development within an SRCDD Zone except in accordance with a development agreement approved pursuant to Policy 8A.11 of the Bedford Highway Secondary Planning Strategy.

development_agreement_controls.condition_text: Development other than permitted uses requires a development agreement approved pursuant to Policy 8A.11 of the Bedford Highway Secondary Planning Strategy.

open_issues.description: The source title reads 'COMPRENSIVE' rather than 'COMPREHENSIVE'; raw source spelling is preserved.
